results.title: Ces Drilon goes viral after exchange with Jimmy Bondoc in interview
results.description: Broadcaster Ces Drilon and lawyer Jimmy Bondoc go viral after a tense live television debate over the ICC investigation on Bato dela Rosa.

results.title: Andrew investigation expands to alleged misconduct at Royal Ascot, reports say | ITV News - ITVX
results.description: Andrew investigation expands to alleged misconduct at Royal Ascot, reports say | ITV News ITVX Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor faces police investigation into ‘alleged inappropriate behaviour at Royal Ascot’ The Guardian Andrew faces allegation over ‘incident with woman’ at Royal Ascot The Times Andrew investigation could look into sexual misconduct allegations BBC Police down to last roll of the dice in Andrew investigation The Telegraph
